sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n38182" key="e)paneleuste/on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπαν-ελευστέον</orth>, <sense id="n38182.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one must return, recur,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἐπί τι</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0660.tlg001:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Apollon.Cit.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
